title: Subtly Glowing Ores
description: Adds an emissive colored outline to the ores! Works with most resource packs!
body:
This resource pack adds colored and glowing outlines to vanilla ores. The glow does not affect other blocks or the world, it is just a visual effect. It works with most resource packs (set this one as topmost).

The pack has two variants:

* OptiFine/Continuity: requires [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity/) or OptiFine.
* Vanilla: does not require other mods.

This pack works on

* Coal (Deepslate) Ore
* Copper (Deepslate) Ore
* Lapis Lazuli (Deepslate) Ore
* Iron (Deepslate) Ore
* Gold (Deepslate) Ore
* Redstone (Deepslate) Ore
* Diamond (Deepslate) Ore
* Emerald (Deepslate) Ore
* Nether Quartz Ore
* Nether Gold Ore
* Ancient Debris
* Block of Raw Iron
* Block of Raw Copper
* Block of Raw Gold

FAQ:

* Q: I don't see the outline! The ores turned dark!
  *  A: Ensure you downloaded the correct variant.
* Q: Still cannot see the outline or it doesn't glow?
  *  A: Make sure it is set as the topmost resource pack and that "Emissive Textures" are enabled in Continuity or OptiFine settings. It may not work with some resource packs that modify ores in a similar way.
* Q: Does it work with [Items on Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/items-on-ores)?
  *  A: Unfortunately not. I will let you know when I find a way!
* Q: Bedrock support? 
  *  A: No.
